## Code Style

## Project-Specific Rules
- User names GitHub releases in the format "AzuHelper vX.X.X".
- Model memory is reset when the conversation is locked.
- Pricing and billing information are available in the billing section.
- This organization uses Copilot for Business.
- Users can ask questions about their code, get suggestions, and learn how to use GitHub tools.
